title: MHPO：稳定强化学习的调制危险感知策略优化
content:

title: 最小动作学习：从噪声数据中识别物理定律的能量约束符号模型选择
content:
arXiv:2603.16951v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：从嘈杂的观测数据中识别物理定律是科学机器学习的核心挑战。我们提出了最小动作学习（MAL），这是一个框架，通过最小化 Tr 从预先指定的基础库中选择符号力定律
original_title: Minimum-Action Learning: Energy-Constrained Symbolic Model Selection for Physical Law Identification from Noisy Data
original_content:

title: DoorDash 推出了一款新的“任务”应用程序，该应用程序向快递员付费，让他们提交视频来训练人工智能
content: 送货员将能够通过完成诸如拍摄日常任务或录制自己用另一种语言说话的活动来赚钱。
original_title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
original_content: Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

title: 谷歌在 OpenClaw 热潮中重组了浏览器代理团队
content: 随着硅谷痴迷于新一波的人工智能编码代理，谷歌和其他人工智能实验室正在改变他们的赌注。
original_title: Google Shakes Up Its Browser Agent Team Amid OpenClaw Craze
original_content: As Silicon Valley obsesses over a new wave of AI coding agents, Google and other AI labs are shifting their bets.

title: 为什么沃尔玛和 OpenAI 正在改变他们的代理购物交易
content: 在 OpenAI 的即时结帐功能出现缺陷后，沃尔玛将其 Sparky 聊天机器人直接嵌入 ChatGPT 和 Google Gemini 中。
original_title: Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal
original_content: After OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature fell short, Walmart is instead embedding its Sparky chatbot directly into ChatGPT and Google Gemini.
